The principle of reciprocity says that we all feel obligated to reciprocate when others give us gifts or concessions. Well gifts or concessions are amplified when they are meaningful, unexpected, and customized to the people we want to persuade. Now the key to being a great sleuth with reciprocity is to first do our homework to discover what a particular recipient would consider a meaningful, unexpected, and customized gift or concession. Second, be sure not to dismiss the rule for reciprocity by how you respond when others tell you thank you for a genuine favor you've done. And third, use the moment of power after a know to start reciprocal concessions. Now there are two things sleuths ask themselves well before a persuasive situation where they can use reciprocity. The first question is how can I help this person? The second is have I done my homework fully enough to make sure my gifts and concessions are seen as meaningful, unexpected, and customized according to the other person's perspective?
